stemHtml: In the northern hemisphere at 5000 ft/AGL a south-westerly wind is blowing. The surface wind at the same location is a southerly wind. What is the primary reason of difference between these two wind directions?

options.a: Friction between the wind and the surface.
options.b: A strong pressure gradient at higher altitudes.
options.c: Stronger Coriolis force at the surface.
options.d: The influence of warm air at the lower altitude.
